## Crash File

Attach the `roller-crash-*` dump or text report generated by the game.

Privacy note: crash dumps and crash reports can contain memory contents,
local file paths, player names, IP addresses, and other local details.
Only attach files you are comfortable sharing publicly.

Describe what you were doing when the crash happened.
